name: Harveys Coconut Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, process coconut until finely chopped. Set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, beat the almond meal until crumbled. Gradually add flour, sugar, and coconut; mix well.
3. Add eggs one at a time; beat until smooth. Stir in nuts.
4. Place dough in a pastry bag with a large star tip. Pipe onto baking sheets covered with parchment paper or foil.
5. Top each macaroon with cherries.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown. Cool for 5 minutes before removing to wire racks.
